basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 20 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT)
basic_details.short_information: G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) has officially announced the Teaching Personnel Recruitment 2026 with 20 openings. The detailed notification has been released under Advt No. CBSH/5/ on the official website of GBPUAT. Candidates holding a Doctorate Degree in the concerned subject or a Master's degree with at least 60% marks along with NET/SLET qualification wherever applicable by ICAR/UGC/CSIR are eligible to participate in the walk-in interview on 03 August 2026. Selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month. The official notification

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GBPUAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download GBPUAT Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for GBPUAT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Teaching Personnel at GBPUAT?
faq.answer: G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) has announced a total of 20 vacancies for the Teaching Personnel positions. These positions are available across various subjects.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time without any prior online application process.

faq.question: Q3. What is the walk-in interview date for GBPUAT Teaching Personnel posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Personnel posts at GBPUAT is scheduled to be held on 03 August 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on time.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification generally requires a Doctorate Degree in the subject concerned, or a Master's degree with at least 60% marks. NET/SLET is essential where conducted by ICAR/UGC/CSIR.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these contractual positions ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month. Some positions may offer an hourly rate with a maximum monthly cap.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for GBPUAT Teaching Personnel recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in the interview to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology, Pantnagar, Uttarakhand, Pin Code: 263145. Specific details about the reporting time and exact location within the university should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the job type for these Teaching Personnel positions is contractual. This means the employment is for a fixed period as per the terms and conditions of the university.
